user.title: Connect to Checkiday
user.description:
This integration fetches today's "National Day" from the Checkiday API via APILayer.

**Get a free API key:**
1. Go to {pricing_link} and create a free APILayer account (no credit card required).
2. Subscribe to the **Free Plan** (100 requests/month, free for life).
3. Copy your API key from the APILayer dashboard and paste it below.

This integration uses 1 request/day, about 30% of your free monthly allowance.

The Free plan can only fetch "today", calculated in the API's own timezone (Central Time) rather than yours - the integration picks a sensible default fetch time to work around this, which you can fine-tune afterwards under **Configure**. See the README for details.

Your key will be tested with one real request before continuing. If it fails, you'll see exactly why.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect to Checkiday
reauth_confirm.description: Your Checkiday API key stopped working. Enter a new key from your APILayer dashboard ({pricing_link}). It will be tested once before continuing.

error.invalid_auth: That API key was rejected. Details: {error_detail}
error.rate_limited: The Checkiday API refused the request (quota or rate limit). Details: {error_detail}
error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach the Checkiday API. Details: {error_detail}
error.unknown: Unexpected error while testing the API key. Check the Home Assistant log for details.

abort.already_configured: This API key is already configured.

init.title: Checkiday options
init.description: Choose when to fetch today's National Day(s) each day.

data_description.update_time: Defaults to a time that accounts for the gap between your timezone and the API's fixed Central Time - see the README for why.
